title: Blinkit South Delhi stockout risk
message: SparkBuds Mini projected to stock out in 2 hours.

title: Ad spend at risk
message: ₹12,000/day active campaign is driving traffic to low-stock SKU.
action: Pause campaign or reallocate budget to Zepto Gurgaon.

title: Return discrepancy detected
message: Returned earbuds are missing accessory and payout is not received.

title: Cross-platform transfer opportunity
message: Zepto Gurgaon has excess SparkBuds Mini stock near Blinkit stockout zone.
action: Transfer 30 units to Blinkit South Delhi.
